creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: Out of curiosity, what Canon printer is this about?  I'm guessing you are using the Canon UFRII driver.  If the printer supports PCL you could probably use the Ghostscript pxlmono (or pxlcolor) device.  It is listed as "HP LaserJet Series PCL 6" in the CUPS web interface if you have print/cups-filters installed.
